articles.title: Average US gas price drops below $3 — but not in these states
articles.summary: (NEXSTAR) — The national average cost for a gallon of regular gas in the U.S. has dropped below $3 for the first time in more than four years, but not every state gets to enjoy the record-low price. AAA reported Thursday that, since Tuesday, the national ...
